text: Telvar — if you're hunting rumors, keep your voice low. The lodge master doesn't like loose talk.
speaker: Daran

text: Aelyn Vesper's gone. Apprentice runners cleared her bunk before first bell — no kit, no letters, nothing but a scrap on the floor in her quarters. If you want answers, you'll have to read what's left and decide who you trust.
speaker: Daran

text: Veneficturis doesn't exile in public. When they vanish someone overnight, assume the reason line stays blank until you're high enough rank to fill it in.
speaker: Daran
